textify($$||($$=(0,Ce.Z)([" There’s a commotion going on, over to one side of the hangar. A bunch of UGC Peacekeepers, shouting and converging on one spot. You sidle over, joining a dozen other rubberneckers. The Peacekeepers, with some difficulty, are wrestling somebody to the ground. A couple are sagged against the wall, as if they’ve been hit somewhere painful. Others are placing weapons and gear on a piece of cloth for inspection: EMP grenades, a sniper rifle, a lust ray. Jasvalla snarls with fury as she’s finally hauled upwards, her wrists cuffed firmly behind her back. “You take your hands off me, peon! I could destroy any of you one on one in any type of combat you choose! Do you not know who you’re disgracing? I am a SagiTom special operative! Ugh!” She is shoved forwards by the burly ausar who cuffed her, towards the security station. Her reticule eyes swing over the gawkers, land on you, and blaze. “Do you think this is the end, Steele?” she cries. Her mellow tones are still as utterly assured as they were the day she accosted you in that elevator. “Do you think lawmen, judges, prisons can keep me from you, can deny fate? I haven’t taught you well enough, beta-to-be. But I will! I will!” “Man,” mutters the kalabast standing next to you. “And I thought my ex was bad.” You are finally rid of your dzaan stalker, a huge relief. Maybe one day you’ll be able to reacquaint yourself with her, on your terms this time, somewhere else. "])))
